title: Dispatcher Board — Phase 1: Static Layout
description: Create a static dispatcher board page with a job pool section and driver columns. No logic or interactions — mock data only. This is the foundation for drag-and-drop in phase 2.
acceptanceCriteria: DispatcherBoard page component renders at /dispatcher/board route
JobPool component renders at top, showing unassigned jobs from mock data
DriverColumn component renders one column per driver from mock data
JobCard component used in both JobPool and DriverColumn
Mock data typed with Job and Driver interfaces in a mockData.ts file
All styling via CSS Modules, no inline styles
implementationNotes: Job type: { id, title, status: DRAFT | ASSIGNED, assignedDriverId: string | null }
Layout: JobPool full width at top, DriverColumns in horizontal flex row below
Route /dispatcher/board must be protected with adminOrDispatcher role guard
Do not install any new dependencies in this phase
